reviews.review_description: I really like this game but the only thing is that the game has been out for two years and u still can’t play multiplayer and it won’t let me play on a 2v2 court or 2v2 with ai and I really want it to come out soon and it’s been saying coming soon for months but expect that it’s a great and fun game and worth the price

developer_response.body:
We’re currently working on it.
2v2 will be available once the 1v1 mode is fully finished and polished. After that, multiplayer will come next. Thanks a lot for the support and patience, we really appreciate it and we’re excited to bring these features as soon as possible!

reviews.review_description: This is one of the best game ever made I really love it  it’s my best vr game and to cheap

In my opinion, there are few game modes; it lacks something customizable like a creator, the ability to position and choose which shot we'll receive from the bot.This should be a basic feature in my opinion.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. Just to clarify, this is PadelVR Game, which is currently in Early Access and includes mini-games, Free Mode, Pass the Ball, and 1vs1 AI matches (in beta). We’re actively developing it, with 2vs2 AI and multiplayer modes planned next. The current price reflects its Early Access stage.

If you’re looking for more advanced customization, like choosing specific shots or positioning, that’s available in our separate app, PadelVR Training, which is focused on structured practice and includes tools like the Configurable Ball Thrower and Custom Drills, statistics and lessons with real time corrections. We’re continuously improving both apps and adding new content regularly.

reviews.review_description:
Would not recommend toe anyone,physics are terrible,limited area
DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY ON THIS GAME ITS IS TERRIBLE

developer_response.body:
Sorry you had a bad experience, but we can’t really agree on that point 😉

The physics when using a VR controller are quite complicated because of the differences in weight and balance compared to a real racket. This forces you to control your wrist much more carefully. A racket adapter solves a large part of this issue. It still requires some time to adapt, but once you get used to it, you can play quite naturally.

As mentioned, playing directly with the VR controller requires much more control than real padel. Even a small wrist movement can create a huge acceleration at the tip of the racket. Because of that, new players—or players who rely mostly on their wrist and don’t yet have good control—will probably send the ball flying if they play without a racket adapter.

Regarding the play area, in match modes you’ll need to use the joystick to move around, unless you have a very large space where you can physically run and move yourself, but part of the modes you dont need more than a 3x3.

Hope to see you playing again but try to start doing soft and good technique hits (flat hit with controlled wrist) until you are adapted, We will be here to help you on any matter!

reviews.review_description: As an early adapter the game was supposed to be ready end of September. Still not a game. Only practice and 90% is off and not in control. Feels like scam. Would appraise an update

developer_response.body:
Match mode VS AI is here! (beta)

Hi! Thanks for your feedback.

Just to clarify, PadelVR is still in Early Access, and we’re improving it every day. Recently we’ve focused on expanding PadelVR Training, but the AI match mode is our top priority and we expect to release the first version before Christmas or early 2026.

Also, are you using the PadelVR racket adapter? Without it, the gameplay can feel less realistic, since the physics are designed around the correct weight and balance of a real racket. Try to control your wrist movement a lot and hand speed.

Thanks for your patience and support while we continue improving PadelVR.

reviews.review_description: I have just played Padel in real life for the first time, this game is spot on. In terms of strength, hitting the ball etc it does it very well.

developer_response.body:
Thanks! 

You can try PadelVR Training free for 7 days and improve your technique with Pablo Crosetti's lessons or with our PadelVR Drills. Try them and let us know what you think.

You can contact us at support@padelvrgame.com or join our Discord channel!

reviews.review_description: During the game, the racket disappears from the player's hand and flies around the court on its own. Meta quest 3.

developer_response.body: We will try, havent got other reports on this issue. If you are using the racket , do you have the Quest3 extra piece for it? also could be that the system is activation the hand tracking: Try to deactivate the hand tracking from the settings menu from the glasses. Also pls send us a email support@padelvrgame.com if the problem persist

reviews.review_title: Great game poor physics and feel cheated
reviews.review_description:
I've updated this review following the developers reply below. 

Love padel and love this game but do not buy the racket if you have the quest 3 unless you have the means to 3d print the adaptor or it becomes available to purchase from the store, it simply does not work properly without it. I missed it's existence so was disappointed that it didn't work.  

I'm playing with only half of the racket until i can get it printed.  My drop shots are improving but i don't want to over commit in case it impacts my real game....

Looking forward to more updates... the forthcoming ai update looks good (check out discord).

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! For Quest 3 and 3S, the extra piece is currently necessary until Meta resolves the "auto hand tracking" issue. Using the racket adapter significantly enhances the feel and realism—it’s a game changer. It's also crucial for maintaining muscle memory when transitioning back to the real court. We're working hard to ensure the final version of the adapter includes the extra piece by default.

reviews.review_description: I find the game excellent but I have one problem I do not seem to be able to change the orientation of the court I need to do this because I have limited space

developer_response.body: Hello, if you want to change the orientation you just need to maintain pressed A (right controller) or X (left controller). It will re-orientate so that the court is directly in front of you. Hope this helps! If you have any question, you can contact us as support@padelvrgame.com

reviews.review_description: This game I so much fun it is awesome highly recommend

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your review!

reviews.review_description:
I like the feelings when playing drills, but some times, and even more recently, when doing bandejas or smashes the ball goes really off and I’m basically doing the same movements. 
Also, I would like to have the choice for training forehand or backhand alone in the drills

developer_response.body: Be sure the headset is not updating something at the background. If the performance drop the phisics can break for a moment. We have been improving the performance on the system, on the next update it should work better. Do you use Training or Game version?

reviews.review_description: The racket doesn’t shoot Where i aim but besides that its good

developer_response.body:
Hi! The physics system is pretty accurate, especially using the racket adapter.
Are you playing directly with the VR controller? If so it is really complicated to do realistic movement and control power and wrist acceleration...
If you are not using the adapter, try turning on the Racket Power Limitation in the Settings and tell us if you see an improvement!

reviews.review_description: VERY GOOD GAME

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review!

reviews.review_description: Going to my first Padel game tomorrow as a work teambuilding. Using padelvr to get an idea is just amazing.

developer_response.body: Good luck with your match! Hope we've helped you improve!. ;)

reviews.review_description: Liñoved the game, had a very realistic experience , but since a few days ago the ball started bouncing off really hard when I hit it. Sometimes it flies into audience with very little effort. I adjusted the bounce rate of the racket and that helped a bit, but not sure why this is happening now. It was working great for several weeks

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! We're glad you noticed the new Power Control option! This feature was designed specifically for players using the VR controllers without the racket adapter to help manage the extra wrist acceleration caused by the lighter controller weight.

The adapter indeed brings a more realistic feel and naturally moderates power, making it easier to control shots. But we hope this new option provides a better balance for all players, whether using an adapter or not.

Thanks again for your insights, and stay tuned—there’s even more on the way as we keep working to improve the experience!

Best,
The PadelVR Team 🎾

reviews.review_description: Great gameplay, but tried several times and multiplayer’s just not functioning on the game for me.

developer_response.body: Hello! Multiplayer is currently not available, that's why the button is disabled, it's a feature that will take some time because it requires a lot of work. We are happy that you are enjoying the game!

reviews.review_description:
This is nuts, it really feels like actually playing padel, I been playing since I’m a kid and now that I live in China and there are no courts in here this is so good to have, really looking forward for the full version and play with other real players. 
Big thanks to the creators!

developer_response.body: TY so much for the review! You must try using a racket adapter. If you cant purchase ours you can check at thingiverse to use a 3d printed one. Adapters improve the realism.

reviews.review_description: Amazing game and feel. Is it possible to have auto movement instead of moving manually?

developer_response.body: Hello, and thanks for your feedback! Auto-movement is a feature we are currently working on. In fact, you can already try it out when playing against the bot. Please keep in mind that it's still a work-in-progress and may have some bugs, but we appreciate any feedback you can provide!

reviews.review_description: I really love this game, thanks a lot for it! But could you please fix physic that was broken recently? Balls are crazy now, I’m playing without adapter

developer_response.body: Hello and thanks for the 5-star review! If you go to the settings menu, you will see an option called "Racket Power Limitation", if you play without an adapter, try having that option activated and see if that improves your feeling on the physics.

reviews.review_description: It is a comfortable game

I liked this game when it came out in the lab, and decided to purchase the racket, and 3D print the adapter for the quest 3.

Slowly bouncing the ball on the racket feels correct, but the strokes just don't feel right, totally different from a real padel experience.

So I am a bit disappointed.

I was hoping for a similar experience like Eleven Table Tennis, but I guess this can't really work because a padel ball is much more heavy than a ping pong ball.

developer_response.body:
Ty for the review! Sorry your feeling. We are still working on the physics since we have plenty of things that we now need to be improved like some inconsistency on the power from time to time. The tracking sometimes is also quite tricky at some shoots (vibora, smash) that's something that we can improve in part, but also some hardware limitations.
Are the issues about tracking loss?
Overall we are pretty happy with the feedbacks, specially from professional padel coachs that has texted already.
Could you send us some videos at our discord of your main issues? Sure that will help us to improve!

reviews.review_description:
As a Padel beginner (and an addict at this point) this have great potential to be a great assistance in practising different aspects of the game, already now in this beta stage it's a great tool and i am looking forward to what the developers would do with this, the developers seems to have a real passion for this project and I am excited with the possibilities this have. 
couple of notes to the developer for maybe future developments: 
1: in the training mode add a speed option, so the VR coach can feed you balls in higher/faster frequency to simulate the intensity of a real match, that could be great.
2: add more options to the training mode like smash, bandeja, serve, etc. 
3: not critical but could be nice to choose racket type (hard, soft, shape, etc) so we can use the same racket we have in real life.

developer_response.body:
Gracias por tus comentarios!

Si todavia no estás seguro prueba entrar a nuestro discord y preguntales a quien la tienen ya. Nosotros la recomendamos y por ahora los jugadores que la poseen dicen siempre que la diferencia es notable.

El peso, la friccion del aire, el agarre etc... son cosas que enriquece mucho la experiencia.

Cualquier duda nos tienes en redes sociales @PadelVR

reviews.review_description: I bought this game to play against the AI, but this part of the game is not yet developed. I find the training mini-game too difficult, even after adjusting the parameters to my height. The ball is often too high or sent directly at us. The movements are a bit too difficult compared to real life. It would be nice to add an automatic movement. Otherwise, the gameplay and the contact of the ball with the racket are perfect, it couldn't be better.

developer_response.body:
We have just the mini game 10 that is a basic bot. Working on it to improve it. And working on the full AI and multiplayer .
Ty for the review.

reviews.review_description: As title

reviews.review_title: Excellent tool for players and trainers
reviews.review_description:
I will start this review by saying that I firmly believe it is impossible to fully re-create a sport on a virtual environment, that being said, Padel VR a wonderful project and it comes as close as it can get to the real thing.

The physics are amazingly real, and while the lack of feedback from hitting the ball is missing, all other aspects of the technique are present, as a padel coach with a high affinity for technology, I can confidently say that there are several aspects that can be improved in your game by using Padel Vr, including but not limited to:
- Timing of impact
- Point of impact
- Use of your non-dominant hand as reference
- Player position
- Applying effects by using a slicing motion, etc

Keep it up Padel Vr team!

developer_response.body:
Ty for the review! I agree, it is almost impossible. At least with the actual technology and comercial systems. But we think that are pretty close on biggest part on this case. Sure we will be able to push the phisics and the adapter a lil more.
We strongly believe that Padelvr will be really useful to learn and practice, apart of have fun. 
Imagine have the coach of n1 player available for lessons at home at any time and been able to practice whatever you need! That’s our goal 😉

reviews.review_description:
I'm learning padel and this app is really a game changer, now i can have a pratice everyday and already see results.

In my case i play in a large garage which let's me use the full lenght of the court greatly improving the playability.

Had some initial dificulty in aligning my play space with the game but after disabling the boundary in Quest2 and realizing that i could use the joystic/green circle  to "move" the court around me it became super easy to garantee i didn't hit a physical wall (did happen once...) . 
A tip i found by chance, one can push the court walls while in the game to tweak the positionning.

Many congrats for the dev team, super solid for a Beta!

couple of suggestions:
- add a "Corner" practice option because it's a zone difficult to master.
- allow an option to combine multiple practice modes like Bandeja + Volley 
- allow racket shape and foam hardness config modes to change the sweet spot location and bounciness level
- add some instructions in the game on how to define the court area vs user physical play area
- add other sounds to choose for the ball hitting the racket

developer_response.body:
Ty so much for your review!
We are developing a full training system with Pablo Crosetti. It will include all the drills with different levels, theorical lessons with a virtual Crosetti (Tapia's Coach) on court and practice with real time corrections, mental training exercises and much more. We hope to have the first version of it at march or April ends.

Apart of that we are also developing the GAME, with multiplayer and AI system and also the Padel adapter for Quest3 controllers... Lot's to do here!

All suggestions noted, biggest part of them on the way already!

reviews.review_title: Great game, but needs some more features
reviews.review_description: If you are looking to improve your game this could really help you a lot. The physics are overall pretty good but sometimes the power you generate is a bit off and the spin on the backwal isn't always correct either (especially topspin). The training balls are great for learning volleys and shots from the back, but there is a section missing where the trainer plays lobs, so that's a huge part of the game still left out. However the game is great and has so much potential, can't wait for the full release!

Great game, biggest issue for me is that the ball many times does not seem to weight and it goes sooo far, not realistic in those moments.

Also mentioned there is no way to practice smah or vibora or bandeja... for practiseing those last 2 i try to get closer to the floor :D so ball is at ot slightly above my head, lol. But the app can make it easier soon.

Btw thanks for creating this, its so fun and i hope it keeps improving!

i have the doubt about if i pay for the "little padel games" those will be ported or discounted from the final version price? :)

Not much of a fan of padel myself but I can appreciate the technical prowess of this Alpha and it's potential.

However my uncle, a padel aficionado but over 30 years of experience was delighted by this game, and cannot wait for a full release.

Looking forward to it.

developer_response.body: Ty so much for the review! Did your uncle tested the latest version with the new physics engine?? Let us know!

reviews.review_description: Playing padel at home is now possible. This version is very consistent and let you to practise all the shots. The experience even improves with the physical racket to insert the control, and gives you a sensation of realism difficult to believe. The mini games that you can buy at a very reduced price can provide you tones of fun. Five stars!!!
Great look and feel of game so far but im looking for multiplayer and assume its not active yet?!

developer_response.body: Hello. Is not ready yet. Working on it. This week we will open a global scoreboard to be able to compete at least on the mini games scores worldwide…

reviews.review_description: Feels amazing ... beautiful game ... fix all the mechanics and release it fast ....

developer_response.body: Ty so much for the review!! Working as fast as we can! But theres a huge work involved... Did you tried the new physics engine?? Regards!

reviews.review_description: My love for Padel could easily lead me to give 5 stars, but I need to restrain myself and provide realistic feedback, hoping to assist the developers. Taking into account all the disclaimers (work in progress, very early alpha version...), I would like to highlight the following: I use an adapter (for Eleven, a table tennis game) and I noticed that I have to exert more force with my forehand compared to reality to send the ball to the other side of the net, while I require much less force with my backhand. When hitting the ball at medium height from the wall, it feels like I have Wawrinka's backhand... This seems noteworthy, even though the game is still in its early stages. Additionally, I was a bit disappointed that the coach doesn't hit any lobs to practice overhead shots. If there's physics to handle volleys, why not provide the opportunity to practice vibora, bandeja, etc.? Nevertheless, it's an excellent start... I believe Padel enthusiasts would be willing to pay any reasonable amount for the full game!
Already an amazing game. Still needs many features such as customized drills and some physics improvements. But already great gameplay. Looking forward for the full game
looks and feel amazing. maybe a little shaggy the movement of the player. Can't wait for a full version or at least multiplayer version.
honestly such a good game i cant wait for it to be finished

First, thank you developers for this fun VR game, I enjoyed playing it very much.
Love to play the full version of this game.  Great work.  More please.
Allow the floor  pass through option if possible because it is much better able to see the court floor when run for the ball.
Yes, I do recommend all sport lover to try this game. 😄
It will be great if it will be possible to realize the project and turn it into a full-fledged game. Let's wait!
Good game so good just need to wait full vr
And we’ll keep making it better…
Finally a padel game its rlly good 10/10 but the power is a bit overrated
I would like  Hungarian subtitles  please !10/10 game
Really good, eager to play some matches online

Definitely not ready for sale. The developers are open about the game being in Alpha status, so far, graphics look good. Playability issues with physics and ability to move around maintaining some level of control. A 360 degree ability to turn  to see the ball behind to anticipate shots off the wall is needed. Don’t give up the effort.

developer_response.body: Hello! Did you had time to test the latest update. We moved to a new physics engine and created the padel racket adapter(quest2). Let us know!

reviews.review_title: The best game in the world
reviews.review_description: The best game in the world, it is my favorite game it is very fun and can’t wait for the full game to be launched.

Great job so farc…can’t wait for the Beta and official start of this great sport 👍🏼

Thank you all
I think it has great potential. Good feelings playing it, good work and keep doing like that and it will be a must buy for me.
